title: Is France’s Centrist Leader Trying to Weatherproof It From the Far Right?
summary_full: President Emmanuel Macron has appointed a string of allies who will remain in critical state positions after next year’s presidential election, and who could thwart a far-right successor.
summary_public: President Emmanuel Macron has appointed a string of allies who will remain in critical state positions after next year’s presidential election, and who could thwart a far-right successor.

FR.label: neutral
